projectDescription: Strella is an AI-moderated user research platform that lets teams run qualitative interviews at scale — from building question guides and recruiting participants to generating insights, highlight reels, and reports automatically.
keyFeatures: AI-moderated interviews with dynamic follow-up questions
Question guide builder with AI generation, media embeds, conditional logic, and randomization
Panel recruitment via Respondent.io and User Interviews with audience targeting
Self-recruitment with shareable study links and URL metadata parameters
Sessions tab with recordings, transcripts, AI-generated notes, and live viewing
Responses tab with keyword search, tag filtering, and Ask Strella AI
Analysis tab with Objective and Question-by-Question views plus segment comparisons
Insights board (Saved tab) for starring and curating key themes
Highlight reel creation, editing, and sharing
AI Chat for asking research questions and generating custom reports
publicApiSurface: URL parameter: user_id (capture metadata in Strella)
URL parameter: source (capture metadata in Strella)
URL parameter: forward_{key} (forward metadata to redirect destination)
Settings > Interview Setup > Redirect to URL (post-interview redirect)
Settings > Interview Setup > Permitted devices (desktop / mobile)
Settings > Theme (logo and button color branding)
Settings > Advanced (LLM, TTS, STT provider selection)
